title: begonia × langeana
intro: Begonia × langeana, also known as the Begonia x hybrida, is a hybrid plant species within the Begoniaceae family. It is a popular ornamental plant, prized for its striking leaves and vibrant flowers. The Begonia × langeana plant has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have led to its use in traditional herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Begonia × langeana, such as infusions and poultices, have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin irritations, and wounds.
